title: Spider-Man: Kraven ka Aakhri Shikaar
logline: Kraven the Hunter ek boodha aur fakhri shikaari hai. Apni maut ka ehsaas hote hi woh Spider-Man ko ek potent tranquilizer goli se ghol kar zinda qabar kar deta hai aur khud Spider-Man ka kapda pehen leta hai. Do hafte baad Peter qabar se bahar nikalta hai. Ek naya Spider-Man sheher mein brutal ho chuka hai. Ab dono ka aakhri muqabla.

characters.name: Spider-Man (Peter Parker)
characters.appearance: Classic red and blue Spider-Man suit with web patterns and white eye lenses. Young man with dark brown hair, casual jacket, athletic build, expressive face.

characters.name: Kraven the Hunter
characters.appearance: Tall muscular man with dark hair and thick beard. Wears distinctive green hunting outfit with brown leather vest and wide-brimmed hat. Later wears Spider-Man costume with fierce expression. Weathered intense features.

characters.name: Mary Jane Watson-Parker
characters.appearance: Stunning woman with flowing red hair. Casual home clothes. Expressive face showing deep love, fear, and determination. Beautiful and strong.

characters.name: Vermin (Billy Russkoff)
characters.appearance: Disfigured feral humanoid. Wild tangled hair, yellowed teeth, tattered clothes. Muscular twisted body. Wild insane eyes. Moves on all fours like an animal.

key_scenes.name: Scene 0
key_scenes.location: NYC Streets at Night - Dark Rainy Alley
key_scenes.visual: Dark rainy night in NYC. Kraven the Hunter stalks through wet streets with a high-powered rifle. He spots Spider-Man swinging between buildings. Kraven aims carefully and fires a potent tranquilizer bullet. Spider-Man is hit in the chest and collapses on the rooftop. Kraven drags the unconscious Spider-Man to a cemetery and buries him alive under pouring rain. Moonlight shines on fresh grave.
key_scenes.dialogue: Kraven: Main ne duniya ke sabse khatarnaak janwar shikaar kiye hain. Lekin aaj sabse khatarnaak shikaar karne wala hoon. Spider-Man. Main uski jagah lunga.

key_scenes.name: Scene 1
key_scenes.visual: Kraven stands in front of a large mirror wearing the Spider-Man costume. He practices web-swinging movements awkwardly then more confidently. He shoots a web line at a wall and tests it. His facial expression in the mask is intense and feral not heroic. He smiles cruelly at his reflection. Cut to him walking through NYC streets where people gasp at this new brutal Spider-Man who beats criminals instead of webbing them.
key_scenes.dialogue: Kraven: Yeh kapda pehen kar main Spider-Man se behtar ban jaunga. Yeh sheher mujhe pehchanega. Main woh karunga jo woh kabhi nahi karta.

key_scenes.name: Scene 2
key_scenes.visual: Complete darkness underground. Peter Parker digs frantically with bare hands bleeding profusely. He gasps for precious air. Visions appear around him - a giant spider, feral beast eyes, shadows of Vermin. The spider voice whispers to become a beast. Peter resists, clutches a photo of Mary Jane to his chest, and pushes upward with all his remaining strength. Earth gives way - he bursts through the surface into moonlight, collapsing on fresh grass, gasping and alive but broken.
key_scenes.dialogue: Peter: Mary Jane mujhe wapas jaana hai main insaan hoon janwar nahi.

key_scenes.name: Scene 3
key_scenes.visual: Night. Mary Jane opens the apartment door. Peter stands there bruised bleeding barely standing. MJ screams in terror then catches him and brings him inside. She tends to his wounds with trembling hands. Peter tries to get up insisting he must stop Kraven. MJ holds him back crying desperately. Peter pulls away gently and forces himself into the Spider-Man suit, weak but resolute.
key_scenes.dialogue: MJ: Peter mat jaao tum mar jaoge! Peter: Main do hoon MJ. Dono. Aur aaj apni zimmedari nibhaunga.

key_scenes.name: Scene 4
key_scenes.visual: An abandoned warehouse dimly lit. Spider-Man enters cautiously. Kraven is waiting sitting calmly on a wooden crate with no weapons. Spider-Man attacks furiously. Kraven dodges weakly barely defends refusing to fight back. Kraven releases the door to a heavy steel cage - Vermin bursts out feral and monstrous. Weakened Spider-Man fights but gets brutally beaten. Vermin pins him down. Kraven watches calmly satisfied. Spider-Man barely escapes by firing webs to pin Vermin to the wall. Kraven walks away his hunt complete.
key_scenes.dialogue: Kraven: Dekha? Tum haar gaye. Main Spider-Man se behtar hoon. Spider-Man: Yeh khatam nahi hua. Main hoon aur hamesha rahunga.

key_scenes.name: Scene 5
key_scenes.visual: Dawn breaks over NYC skyline. Kraven sits alone on rooftop Spider-Man costume removed wearing hunting clothes holding the rifle. Flashbacks: young Kraven hunting deer, first encounter with Spider-Man, the night he buried him alive, beating criminals as Spider-Man. He looks peaceful. He writes a detailed confession letter with photographic proof. He loads one bullet into the rifle, looks at the beautiful rising sun, and pulls the trigger. His body slumps gently. The confession letter and photos are beside him.
key_scenes.dialogue: Kraven: Main ne poora jeevan shikaar kiya. Aakhri shikaar mera khud ka tha. Spider-Man tum jeet gaye. Lekin mujhe shaanti mil gayi.

key_scenes.name: Scene 6
key_scenes.location: City Streets - Vermin Chase and Aftermath
key_scenes.visual: Spider-Man chases Vermin through dark alleyways. Vermin is fast and feral running on all fours. Spider-Man is weak but uses intelligence, luring Vermin toward the surface through manholes. They break through into a bright noisy city intersection with traffic and crowds. Vermins senses overload - bright sunlight, car horns, and city noise render him helpless. He collapses screaming. Spider-Man webs him to a lamppost exhausted but victorious. Police arrive. Spider-Man looks at sunrise then swings away into the city skyline.
key_scenes.dialogue: Spider-Man: Isse reed richards ko ilaaj milega. Yeh janwar nahi ek insaan hai jo bimar hai.
